text.heroSub: A website dedicated to one of the most prominent movements in United States history.
text.whoTitle: If you want to remember me, organize.
text.whoBody: Los Chicanos, or 'The Chicanos', refers to people from Mexican descent, born on U.S. soil. In the midst of a predominantly caucasian society, Chicanos used a previously derogatory slur to empower themselves. Chicanos often advocated for better working conditions, improved healthcare, and increased pay for their labor.
text.causeIntro: Briefly introduce what the movement was fighting for.
text.flashIntro: Introduce the major events of the movement.
text.legacyText: Summarize the movement's lasting impact here.
text.footerNote: A student research project. Every quotation, image, and fact is documented in our Annotated Bibliography (MLA).
